title: Light Up LED Mini Table Pool - Compact Portable Arcade-Style Gaming, Battery-Operated with Sliding Scoreboards, Fast-Paced Action Table Game Set for All Ages Family Fun
features: Home Arcade Gaming Experience: Transform any room into your personal arcade with this light up pool table for kids. The design features an LED function, bringing excitement to every match of table pool

Exciting LED Light-Up Design: Flashing LED corners and vibrant side lighting bring pool to life. Whether it’s a birthday party, Christmas gift, or rainy-day boredom buster, watch the competitive spirit soar as players battle it out

Skill-Building Fun: This tabletop games favourite sharpens hand-eye coordination and reflexes through fast-paced play. Children develop strategic thinking and motor skills whilst having a brilliant time with their friends & family!

Portable Power: Battery-operated for non-stop indoor games, Whether it’s family competition or solo practice. The lightweight design means you can easily move this tabletop game excitement from room to room

Family Game Night Ready: These arcade games for kids bring endless entertainment for children ages 6 and up. , includes cues, balls and triangle, so you're ready to play straight away, right out of the box
description: Turn game time into an epic LED adventure with this thrilling air hockey table, ideal as a gift for arcade game-loving kids aged 6 and up. This compact table brings arcade-style excitement to any room, complete with sliding scoreboards and smooth-gliding action. Whether you're planning birthday celebrations or looking for Christmas gifts, this portable game delivers hours of fast-paced fun whilst helping develop hand-eye coordination. Fun and excitement for all the family!
